query:
SELECT 
  paymentMethod,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(totalAmount)/100 as total_amount_rupees
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-01' 
  AND createdAt < '2026-05-01' 
  AND orderStatus != 'cancelled'
  AND outletId = 1
GROUP BY paymentMethod
ORDER BY total_amount_rupees DESC;
